main.description: An owner-owned materialized snapshot of a playhtml room's shared state. Supports data ownership / export (Option B): the live document is periodically checkpointed into the site owner's repo so they hold a real, portable copy. The record key SHOULD be a stable hash of the room id.

snapshot.description: Materialized JSON view of the room: { [capability]: { [elementId]: data } }.

version.description: Monotonic checkpoint version; higher supersedes lower.
